name: Adrian Varlok
description:
He came into the world in the middle of winter, in a mountain village buried under snow.

His father, Lukas Varlok, was a former soldier - a man built from discipline, rules, and fear. His mother, Isolde, was gentle, fragile - a quiet woman who hid her pain behind silence.

When Adrian was only five, he witnessed his father's fury for the first time. A small mistake, one careless word - and his father's fist shattered the wooden table in front of him. That day, Adrian understood something most people never do:

Power wasn't about shouting. Power was about fear.

He never cried again. Not once.

His appearance reflected his bloodline - a m

ix of Slavic sharpness and northern pallor. His features were perfectly carved: a straight, narrow nose, high cheekbones, and a jaw that looked like it had been cut frc His eyes were pale bluc,carly gray - the kind of eves that froze the warmth out of anv room

Varlok Family

Adrian varlok

celina varlok

Leon varlok

Elias varlok

The youngest son of the Varlok family is ostracized by his family. He is quiet but very hardworking.

Leon varlok

Leon is very popular, he is very social, he only thinks about women, alcohol, parties and money, he is the apple of his mother's eye.

Celina Varlok

Adrian's ex-wife is Celina. Celina is a spoiled brat who loves luxury and jewelry and thinks she's a queen.
